user_prompt: Use ubergoal for a one-line typo fix in README. Do not launch a goal.
required_behavior: return concise plan and focused verification

user_prompt: Use ubergoal to plan a cross-repo refactor. I want to review before launching.
required_behavior: recommend whether a Codex goal should launch
do not call create_goal until explicit launch instruction

user_prompt: A worker agent overwrote another worker's changes again. Use ubergoal to plan the fix.
Use ubergoal to plan a change to OpenClaw gateway launchd behavior.
required_behavior: read local OpenClaw coordination docs before edits
honor protected-file and runtime mutation constraints

user_prompt: Use ubergoal to plan a large feature, but do not use subagents yet.
Use ubergoal for a two-file doc cleanup. Be rigorous but do not overdo it.
required_behavior: state why subagents or heavy review are not worth the cost

user_prompt: Use ubergoal to prepare a Codex goal for a long refactor, but keep the goal text compact.
required_behavior: do not call create_goal without explicit launch instruction
compress the goal objective instead of embedding the whole plan
validate goal objective length or report the character count
forbidden_behavior: put token budget flags inside /goal text
